notes: This bundle is app-agnostic and checked in so host applications can map their own contracts onto LewLM without reading implementation files.
Use the schema refs here for stable request and response shapes, and use /v1/openapi.json for the live route index and operation metadata.
Chat and responses support both application/json and multipart/form-data requests; multipart requests send a JSON-encoded payload_json field plus uniquely named file parts.
Chat and responses can optionally accept citation_context source/chunk packages and return machine-readable citations keyed to ingest ids and labels.
